content.text: Switch the worker pool to the node runtime instead of bun for the developer pages.
Plan: move src/worker/pool.ts to a node-runtime entrypoint and update the developer pages build config.
Review the notion of caching in the developer pages notes and tell me what we already documented.
We already documented LRU caching with a 5-minute TTL in developer pages notes; nothing on stampede protection yet.
Holding off — that's ambiguous about which PR you mean; let me confirm before merging.
Sorry typo: deplyo the staging build whne CI is green.
Understood — I'll deploy the staging build when CI is green.
Continuing with the current task — deploying staging now.
Actually don't deploy staging; we agreed earlier to hold staging deploys until QA signs off.
Got it — holding the staging deploy and flagging this as a contradiction against the earlier go-ahead.
